en.extract:
The pale-crowned cisticola (Cisticola cinnamomeus) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae.


Taxonomy
Cisticola cinnamomeus was split from Cisticola brunnescens (pectoral-patch cisticola); since 2000 it has been recognised as a separate species by most world bird-listing authorities.


Distribution
It is found in Africa from eastern South Africa to Gabon and Tanzania.


Habitat
Its natural habitats are damp or marshy areas in upland grassland.


References


External links
Pectoral-patch cisticola - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.

The '''pale-crowned cisticola''' ('''''Cisticola cinnamomeus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]].

==Taxonomy==
''Cisticola cinnamomeus'' was split from ''Cisticola brunnescens'' ([[pectoral-patch cisticola]]); since 2000 it has been recognised as a separate species by most world bird-listing authorities.<ref>{{cite web|last1=Lepage|first1=Denis|title=Avibase - The World Bird Database|url=http://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?lang=EN&avibaseid=6F165487&sec=summary&ssver=1|website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org|accessdate=7 November 2016}}</ref>

==Distribution==
It is found in [[Africa]] from eastern [[South Africa]] to [[Gabon]] and [[Tanzania]].<ref name="Sinclair2003">{{cite book|last1=Sinclair|first1=Ian|last2=Ryan|first2=Peter|title=Birds of Africa south of the Sahara|date=2003|publisher=Struik|location=Cape Town|isbn=9781868728572|page=510}}</ref><ref name="hbw2016">{{cite web|author1=Ryan, P.  |author2=Dean, R.|title=Pale-crowned Cisticola (Cisticola cinnamomeus)|url=https://www.hbw.com/species/pale-crowned-cisticola-cisticola-cinnamomeus|website=Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive|publisher=Lynx Edicions|accessdate=7 November 2016}}</ref>

==Habitat==
Its natural [[habitat]]s are damp or marshy areas in upland grassland.<ref name="Sinclair2003" /><ref>{{cite book|last1=Stevenson|first1=Terry|last2=Fanshaw|first2=John|title=A Field Guide to the Birds of East Africa|date=2002}}</ref>

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
* Pectoral-patch cisticola - [https://sabap2.adu.org.za/docs/sabap1/668.pdf Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds].
